message:
perf(dashboard): use CSS flex order for instant sort switching

Instead of rebuilding DOM on sort column change:
- Table uses flex layout with CSS order property
- applySortOrder() just sets style.order on each row
- Instant visual reorder without DOM manipulation

Also:
- Add requestMetrics() for on-demand data refresh
- Sort change triggers background refresh for fresh data
- Fix updateSelectionFast() to work with CSS-ordered rows
